basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Project Engineer, Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Candidates who have B.Tech in CSE/ECE/IT or equivalent discipline, or BCA/B.Sc-CS or equivalent qualification are eligible to apply for these Project Staff vacancies. The online application process for IIT Guwahati Project Staff Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 23 May 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech in CSE/ECE/IT or equivalent discipline, BCA/B.Sc-CS or equivalent discipline
qualification.details: Assistant Project Engineer: B.Tech in CSE/ECE/IT or equivalent discipline. Candidates with a background in Cyber security would be given preference. Project Assistant: BCA/B.Sc-CS or equivalent discipline. Knowledge of office automation tools is desirable.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualification and experience Online Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Guwahati Project Staff recruitment is 23rd May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for Project Staff positions at IIT Guwahati. These include 2 posts for Assistant Project Engineer and 1 post for Project Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required for the Assistant Project Engineer post is a B.Tech degree in CSE/ECE/IT or an equivalent discipline. Preference will be given to candidates with a background in Cyber security.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Project Staff positions ranges from Rs. 16000/- to Rs. 27000/- per month, depending on the specific post and qualifications of the selected candidate.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Staff roles?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications and experience, followed by an online interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Project Staff positions at IIT Guwahati is contractual. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q9. What is the expected joining date after selection?
faq.answer: The expected joining date for the selected candidates is 01st July 2026. This date may be subject to change based on administrative requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Assam apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Assam. However, for definitive eligibility regarding domicile, it is best to refer to the official notification PDF.
